# {{PROJECT_NAME}} — GitX Release Policy (auto-generated by gitx-init)

> Project-level excerpt of the TKX Git Release policy.
> Full reference upstream: see `gitx-release` skill `references/TKX_Git_Release_policy_and_process.md`.
>
> - Project type: **{{PROJECT_TYPE}}**
> - Generated: {{DATE}} by gitx-release {{GITX_VERSION}}

## Core invariants

1. **`VERSION` sidecar** is the single source of truth — never `SKILL.md metadata.version` (Gotcha #16).
2. **`Release/CHANGELOG.md`** is top-anchored: newest version's `## vX.Y.Z — YYYY-MM-DD` first.
3. **`.sanitize-ignore`** is the only path-anchored whitelist for sanitize detector hits.
4. **Dual-source contract**: `scripts/` and `skills/<name>/scripts/` must be byte-identical at audit time.
5. **No `--no-verify`, no `git push --force`** to main/master without explicit Boss approval.

See `RELEASE_GUIDELINE.md` at project root for the dev-session AI Agent's entry-point index.
